projects.name: Questionnaire Automator
projects.description: Answers RFP and security questionnaires using ThousandEyes documentation via local Ollama. Supports Excel, CSV, Word, PDF, and plain text — 100% local, no API keys required.

projects.name: Reference Architecture Generator
projects.description: Generates network reference architectures from plain text, uploaded diagrams, or live ThousandEyes data. Includes test coverage overlay and export to draw.io and PowerPoint.

projects.name: Customer Showcase Gallery
projects.description: Curated collection of sanitized ThousandEyes demo artifacts — incident reports, path visualizations, and executive dashboards built with the SE visual guide.
